description: This is the logo for the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS). It features the text "Land" on the top line and "Monitoring Service" on the bottom line, both rendered in a light olive green colour against a white background. To the left of the text is a graphical element enclosed by a curved arc, also in light olive green. This graphic combines three vertical rectangular bars of varying heights, reminiscent of buildings or a bar chart, alongside a stylized wheat or grain stalk.
